learningTarget: Identify living vs non-living things with 90% accuracy

personas.name: Struggling Student
issues: Confuses living/non-living classifications (e.g., thinks fire is living)
Difficulty articulating why something is living using sentence stems
Struggles with abstract concept of 'needs' and 'survival'
Requires visual supports for every question
Difficulty with exit ticket drawing task - incomplete

personas.name: Average Student
issues: Minor confusion between plants and animals initially
Sometimes forgets to explain 'why' when identifying

personas.name: Advanced Student
issues: Needs extension activities - curriculum too easy
Finishes tasks quickly, requests more challenging material

personas.name: ESL Student
issues: Difficulty with sentence stems in English

personas.name: Bored Student
issues: Already knows living vs non-living from kindergarten
Rushes through exit ticket without effort
